creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: beech
Date: Wed Dec 26 15:16:40 2012
New Revision: 309525
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/309525

Log:
  - Update to 3.4.5
  - Update maintainer address
  
  PR:		ports/174639
  Submitted by:	Cristiano Rolim Pereira <cristianorolim@outlook.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/sysutils/loganalyzer/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/sysutils/loganalyzer/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/sysutils/loganalyzer/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/sysutils/loganalyzer/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/loganalyzer/Makefile	Wed Dec 26 14:17:31 2012	(r309524)
+++ head/sysutils/loganalyzer/Makefile	Wed Dec 26 15:16:40 2012	(r309525)
@@ -6,11 +6,11 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	loganalyzer
-PORTVERSION=	3.0.0
+PORTVERSION=	3.4.5
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils www
 MASTER_SITES=	http://download.adiscon.com/loganalyzer/
 
-MAINTAINER=	cristianorolim@hotmail.com
+MAINTAINER=	cristianorolim@outlook.com
 COMMENT=	Web based Syslog browsing and analysis
 
 NO_BUILD=	YES
@@ -38,7 +38,6 @@ DEFAULT_PHP_VER=5
 
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 
-
 .if !defined(WITHOUT_PHP_DEPENDS)
 .if defined(WITH_PHP_MYSQL)
 USE_PHP+=	mysql
